Localization.Description: Running a process under a database account may indicate an attempt of an attacker who gained the ability to execute queries to the database to escalate privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Attempt to create user-defined function {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
Process {object.process.name} is run as user {subject.account.name} (MySQL database user "{subject.application.account.name}") on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to run a process as user "{subject.application.account.name}" of the MySQL database on host {event_src.host}
